# **✅ SLIDE 1 — HERO / FIRST SCREEN (Black background | white laters)**

Background:

Full-screen video — JetCar driving dynamically on water (open sea / lagoon).

Smooth motion, premium color grading, no text overlays on video.

Top line (small text):

Next-Generation JetCar Manufacturing · UAE

Main headline (large text):

Create. Drive. Dominate the water.

CTA button:

Discover More (Redirects to News) \- configurat your jet car

Same design

# **✅ SLIDE  — CONFIGURATOR (Black background | white laters)**

## **Models Selector (top, clickable)**

MODEL R  MODEL F  LUMINA  CYBERMARINE

![][image2]

Same design

---

## **Center Headline**

The world’s first real-time online JetCar configurator.

---

## **Main CTA**

Create Your JetCar

(Redirects directly to the configurator of the selected model)

---

## **Dynamic Model Information (changes with selected model)**

### **MODEL R**

Refined Performance

• Length: 5.22 m

• Width: 2.06 m

• Depth: 1.82 m

• Seating: 4–5 persons

• Engine Brand: Yamaha

• Engine: 1900 cc

• Certification: CE Certified

Designed for premium leisure and commercial use, compliant with CE standards for global operation.

---

### **MODEL F**

Pure Power on Water

• Length: 5.22 m

• Width: 2.06 m

• Depth: 1.83 m

• Seating: 2 persons

• Engine Brand: Yamaha

• Engine: 1900 cc

• Certification: CE Certified

A high-performance JetCar engineered for speed, control, and CE-compliant commercial use.

---

### **LUMINA**

Innovation in Motion

• Length: 3.40 m

• Width: 2.15 m

• Seating: 2 persons

• Engine Brand: Tohatsu

• Engine Type: Outboard

• Certification: CE Certified

A compact, agile water kart developed in accordance with CE safety and quality requirements.

---

### **CYBERMARINE**

The Future, Reimagined

Coming Soon

A future-focused concept designed for next-generation water mobility, with planned CE certification.

---

# **✅ SLIDE 3 — MODELS (Tiffany background | black laters)**

## **MODELS**

Discover All Models

---

### **MODEL R**

Refined Performance

Explore the Model

Download Brochure

Designed for premium leisure and commercial use, combining luxury aesthetics with stable performance on water.

Manufactured in compliance with CE certification requirements for international markets.

---

### **MODEL F**

Pure Power on Water

Explore the Model

Download Brochure

A performance-focused JetCar created for speed, agility, and an intense driving experience.

Engineered in accordance with CE standards for safety and quality.

---

### **LUMINA**

Innovation in Motion

Explore the Model

Download Brochure

• Length: 3.40 m

• Width: 2.15 m

• Seating: 2 persons

• Engine Brand: Tohatsu

• Engine Type: Outboard

• Certification: CE Certified

A compact and innovative water kart designed for dynamic handling and maximum fun on water.

Developed to meet CE certification requirements for regulated markets.

---

### **CYBERBOAT**

The Future, Reimagined

Coming Soon

A bold next-generation concept exploring new forms of water mobility and futuristic design language.

Planned for CE-compliant production and international deployment.

# **✅ SLIDE 5 — NEWS · E-DRIVE (Tiffany background | black laters)**

# **![][image4]**

Same design / Tiffany background 

NEWS · E-DRIVE WORLD

Next Step \>\>\> swipe to the right

Featured visual: 

Large image — actual news pic

---

### **15 APR 2026**

E-DRIVE EXPANDS INTERNATIONAL OPERATIONS

E-Drive continues its global expansion with CE-compliant JetCar deployments across strategic international markets.

---

### **02 MAR 2026**

NEXT-GENERATION JETCAR PRODUCTION UPDATE

Manufacturing updates from our UAE factory, focusing on CE certification, quality control, and design evolution.

---

### **18 FEB 2026**

E-DRIVE AT GLOBAL MARINE EVENTS

Showcasing CE-certified JetCars at leading international marine and luxury exhibitions.

---

### **05 JAN 2026**

ENGINEERING & DESIGN EVOLUTION

Advancing hull technology, safety systems, and CE-compliant engineering standards.

---

## **LEGAL NOTICE**

The specifications, features, and visuals displayed on this website may vary depending on market availability and configuration.

Product availability, specifications, and compliance may differ based on regional regulations.

If you believe information is incorrectly displayed for your location, please contact an authorized E-Drive representative.

---

## **WARNING ABOUT UNAUTHORIZED OFFERS**

E-Drive is not a publicly traded company and does not offer shares or equity through this website.

E-Drive may present individual investment and partnership opportunities, including projects related to JetCar placement and operation, exclusively on a contractual basis and through authorized company representatives.

Any third-party claims regarding the sale of shares, equity participation, or investment products on behalf of E-Drive without official written confirmation from the company are unauthorized.

---
